card.heading: Refund policy
card.sessionNote: Please read the session refund policy before completing payment.
card.packageNote: Please read the package refund policy before completing payment.
card.loadingNote: We are checking the active policy before you continue.
card.blockedNote: You cannot complete payment right now because the refund policy is unavailable.
card.validationNote: We could not use the refund policy for this payment. Please try again.
card.staleNote: The refund policy was updated. Please review it and accept it again.
card.checkboxHint: You must accept the refund policy before paying.
card.checkboxLabel: I agree to the refund policy
card.checkboxNote: The payment button stays disabled until you agree.
card.readPolicyNote: Open the full view to read the clauses clearly before continuing.

public.title: Refund policies
public.description: Review the currently active refund policies for sessions and package purchases.
public.loadingNote: We are fetching the active policy version.
public.unavailableNote: We could not load this policy right now. Please try again.
public.notConfiguredNote: The current active {type} refund policy has not been published yet.
public.relatedNote: Use the links to move between the public session and package policies.
public.noteBody: These pages always show the current active version only. Session payments use the session policy and package purchases use the package policy.
public.noContent: No localized policy content is available.
public.noClauses: No clauses have been published yet.
public.noRules: No rules have been published yet.
